role_title: Program Manager, Foundations Data and Operations

location.office_time_required: some hybrid travel to San Francisco; may require living close to some physical operations across the US

seniority.level: Senior IC / Lead (8+ years experience signal)
level_signals: 8+ years of experience in operations, strategy, venture capital, private equity, or consulting
at least 5 years operating within a company
Direct experience engaging with executives and senior leaders
End-to-end ownership of large, ambiguous problems

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Have 8+ years of experience in operations, strategy, venture capital, private equity, or consulting, with at least 5 years operating within a company.
must_haves.qualifier: operations, strategy, VC, PE, or consulting with 5+ years operating within a company

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Have experience taking end-to-end ownership of large, ambiguous problems, and breaking them down into clear, actionable plans.
Have direct experience engaging with executives and senior leaders to influence and drive strategic decisions.
Excel under pressure, bringing a high motor and exceptional adaptability and flexibility in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.

Are highly analytical - sophisticated in your understanding and approach to analyses; ability to ask and answer the most important questions, and present results clearly to leaders to influence decision making.
Are comfortable operating at all altitudes – discussing strategy and vision with executives, and troubleshooting operations with individual contributors and external partners.
Have excellent communication and cross-functional collaboration skills.
Are passionate about technology and artificial intelligence, and interested in its impact on business and society.

scope.surface: Foundations Data and Operations — training data acquisition programs (web crawler, data partnerships, training datasets)
scope.business_model: internal research enablement at frontier AI company
core_responsibilities: Work closely with research to understand data needs and define acquisition priorities and timeline
Translate research objectives into clear technical requirements and operational plans
Lead vendor and partner engagements for data sourcing – including evaluating suppliers, negotiating agreements, and managing delivery
Establish and maintain metrics for data quality, throughput, efficiency, and overall program performance
Identify gaps in our data ecosystem and proactively drive initiatives to strengthen our data acquisition and creation capabilities over time

green_flags: Clear description of team mission and scope (Foundations Data and Operations)
Specific callout that high-trajectory candidates with fewer years may be considered, indicating flexibility
Role has broad ownership and strategic impact — directly advances model intelligence
Cross-functional exposure across research, executives, and external partners
red_flags: Role may require living near physical operations across the US and hybrid travel to San Francisco — location flexibility is limited but not fully defined
8+ years experience threshold is high; exact scope of physical operations not described
No explicit mention of visa sponsorship

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 8+ years requirement and executive engagement signals)
scope.business_model (inferred from team description as internal research enablement)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not directly stated as KPIs)
location.remote_us_eligible (inferred false from hybrid travel and physical operations language)
compensation.equity_mentioned (inferred false; not stated in JD)
ambiguities: Location is ambiguous: JD says 'some hybrid travel to San Francisco' and 'living close to some physical operations across the US' but does not name a primary base city or specify whether fully remote is permitted. Treated as hybrid with San Francisco as the named city.

Years of experience: JD states 8+ years overall but also says 'We will also consider high-trajectory candidates with fewer years of experience but at top companies with a clear track record of excellence' — making the 8-year floor soft in practice. Classified as hard severity per schema rules but flagged here.
Visa sponsorship is not mentioned anywhere in the JD body. Treated as unclear.
